videos.title: Formula Offroad Iceland, Egilsstaðir 2020! Ágúst Halldórsson - Kölski
videos.description:
Formula Offroad Iceland, Egilsstaðir 2020!
Third place in Street Legal Class! Ágúst Halldórsson driving Kölski (The Devil) His first race in Formula Offroad. Ágúst bought The Devil, an old Icelandic champion car.
Event Organizer - START Akstursíþróttaklúbbur
Produced - Jakob C - www.facebook.com/jakobcoffroad
